name: 101 Dogs Hidden in Singapore
short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in Singapore🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️
detailed_description:
✍️ 101 Dogs Hidden in Singapore challenges you to find puppies hidden in a beautiful, hand-crafted landscape.

🎵 While you search, enjoy a calming and captivating soundtrack.

🐶 Earn tons of achievements.

🏆 Challenge your friends to find all the puppies in the fastest time! ⏱️

GAMEPLAY:

🐾 101 dogs hidden in a single landscape.
👉 Click on the puppies you find.
👀 Adjust brightness to avoid eye strain.
🔎 AMAZING ZOOM!

🐕‍🦺🦴🐕 🐩

reviews.review_text:
[h3] [b] 101 DOGS HIDDEN IN SINGAPORE [/b] [/h3]

Relaxing and funny game where you just need to find 101 hidden dogs. Once you find them all, you just completed the whole game. Sounds easy right? Some dogs are really tough to find but you will figure it out. If you are missing some and can not find them, just take a look at my guide. :)

Overall it is a good game to decompress. If you have good eyes for seeking it will take you about 15 minutes to 30 minutes at maximum. Also you will get easily 100 achievements. GL & HF.
The soundtrack perfectly matches the atmosphere 🐕🎶
Relaxing and fun at the same time 🐾😊
It’s impossible to stay in a bad mood while playing this 🐶😄
Sharp reflexes for finding all 101 dogs 👁️🧠
